target.html:
Chef's Special V

Truffle Risotto

Arborio rice slow-cooked with wild mushrooms, aged parmesan, and a generous drizzle of black truffle oil.

🕐 25 min 🔥 480 kcal ⭐ 4.9
$24.00
Pairs well with: Pinot Noir Sparkling Water Tiramisu
